violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cutting boards in the meat department are gouged and black, no longer a cleanable surface.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Residential stove was not under a hood system. Walls around oven have grease accumulation, employee stated they cook and use the oven to cook raw meat and poultry products under no hood system.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. Sink in the meat department has only 2 compartments.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Nitrile Gloves, produce bags, single serve containers were on the ground in the dry storage area.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Dishes and a bag of dish detergent were stored in the hand sink in the meat department.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walls and ceiling above the ovens in the deli department need to be cleaned. Walk-in floors need to be cleaned.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Visible light coming through the bottom of the doors located in the meat department and next to the loading bay. Large gap under the doors.
Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. Cooler logs were last entered 9/25/2025.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
